'''Gareth''' was the [[Shalamite]] [[King/Legends|king]] of [[Shalam]] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]. A keen [[laro]] player, he traveled to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] where he cheated at the card game but got out-swindled by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] when he lost to the then-[[General/Legends|general]]. [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] later visited Gareth with [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and her children for a two-week long treaty signing.
